briefing: The Borough has assigned you a fixed beat. You'll start to recognise faces — and you'll be expected to enforce the rules without fear or favour. Inspector Harding is stepping up the spot checks: three decisions sampled, £5 a piece for any error.
newRuleSummary: All Day 1–3 rules remain in force.
Some drivers may leave a note on the dashboard. Notes do not change the regulations.
Supervisor review: 3 of your decisions will be sampled. £5 deducted per missed PCN or wrongful ticket.

variants.neutral: Sorry — appointment ran over. Walter needed help back to the car.
variants.negative: Please reconsider, Warden. Walter's hospital bill arrived this morning. I'll set my watch from now on.
variants.positive: Thank you for the kindness yesterday. God bless you.

variants.neutral: Just dropping a fare. Out in two minutes — promise.
variants.negative: Cheers for the £80 ticket, mate. Paperwork's at DVLA — take it up with them.
variants.positive: Appreciate the leniency. New permit through next week, promise.

variants.neutral: Building merchants close at 4. Ten minutes, then I'm gone.
variants.negative: Ten minutes I said. Council loves a small contractor, eh?
variants.positive: Cheers boss. Number 14 says hello — kitchen done by Friday.

variants.neutral: Just collecting my prescription from Boots. Knees aren't what they were.
variants.negative: I shan't park here again. Most disappointed in the council.
variants.positive: Such a kind young thing. There's a bag of pear drops in the door pocket if you'd like one.
